prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

PREVIOUS CLIP (already provided as video input — continue from its last frame):
INT. BARE ROOM - NIGHT. The Narrator speaks. Character_The_Narrator ON CAMERA lip-syncs "and observe how healthily — how calmly I can tell you the whole story.". Character_The_Narrator still wears plain dark waistcoat, white shirtsleeves, rolled cuffs Camera directive: Settling medium shot, 35mm lens, gentle pull reveals folded hands and calm posture over table. Performance: Acting intensity 5/10: Forced serene smile, half-lowered lids, cheeks tight with tension Optics: f/2.0 moderate-shallow depth of field, gentle bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219 film stock, desaturated cool-teal shadows and warm amber candle highlights

CONTINUITY: This is a seamless EXTENSION of the provided previous video. Pick up from its last frame. Same character identity, wardrobe, lighting, and location. Natural progressive motion only — do not invent a new establishing shot or redesign faces/outfits. IDENTITY: Match locked plate descriptions in CHARACTER VARIABLES exactly — do not drift to illustration, anime, cartoon, or a different face/wardrobe. On-screen: Character_The_Narrator.

THIS CLIP:
Silent beat — no dialogue in this clip. Do not show any on-screen character speaking or mouthing words; keep mouths closed/neutral. End cleanly when the primary physical action finishes.
INT. BARE ROOM - NIGHT. The Narrator almost smiles. Character_The_Narrator still wears plain dark waistcoat, white shirtsleeves, rolled cuffs Camera directive: Held close-up on mouth and eyes, 85mm lens, static frame as almost-smile flickers in candlelight. Performance: Acting intensity 4/10: One-sided almost-smile creeps, eyes cold unblinking, cheek twitches Optics: f/1.4 shallow depth of field, creamy soft bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219 film stock, desaturated cool-teal shadows and warm amber candle highlights / 480p, 24fps

NEGATIVE: no legible text, no watermarks, no logos, no extra limbs, blur/obscure environmental signage or screens, no name tags, no name badges, no embroidered names, no lower thirds, no personal names on clothing or props, no extra unmentioned hats or jackets, no modern wristwatches, no electric light bulbs, no plastic, no zippers, no modern cars, no printed logos, no denim, no asphalt, no modern hair gel, no sneakers, no power lines, no smartphones.
